templates.name: science-page
templates.description: AbbVie Science landing page with hero, dashboard stats, video embed, content columns, cards, accordion, FAQ CTA band, and footer CTA sections. Note: AbbVie uses Scene7 lazy-loaded images (data-cmp-src) that require resolution during import.

templates.name: leaders-listing
templates.description: R&D Leaders listing page with hero header and grid of leader profile cards

templates.name: leader-profile
templates.description: Individual R&D leader profile page with hero and biography columns

sections.name: FAQ + CTA Band
sections._comment: Section contains FAQ heading + accordion block + CTA band (image, heading, description, CTA link). CTA band is default content after accordion, styled via CSS as a full-bleed light blue band with 2-column grid layout. FAQ accordion is constrained to 7/12 columns centered (grid-column: 3 / span 7).

templates.name: clinical-trials
templates.description: Clinical trials informational page with hero, two-column content grid, full-width image-text section, accordion for additional info, and multi-column bottom sections

blocks.name: publications
blocks.description: Science publications listing page with hero, breadcrumb, flex-section layout (7-col main + 2-col sidebar). Main section has tag-utility-nav search block with filterable publication list. Sidebar has related content card, separator block, and topics list.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.description: Science publications listing page with hero, breadcrumb, flex-section layout (7-col main + 2-col sidebar). Main section has tag-utility-nav search block with filterable publication list. Sidebar has related content card, separator block, and topics list.

sections.name: partner-with-us
sections.description: Science sub-page for partnership information, similar layout to clinical-trials with hero, content sections, and informational blocks

sections.name: abbvie-ventures
sections.description: AbbVie Ventures page with hero, sidebar with related content/topics, main content with 2 accordion blocks (investment team, scientists in residence), and related content cards at bottom

sections.name: educational-grants
sections.description: Independent Educational Grants page with hero, sidebar with topics, main content with CTA, image+goals section, grants list, accordion for therapeutic areas, and full-width apply CTA at bottom

blocks.name: abbvie-ventures
blocks.description: AbbVie Ventures page with hero, sidebar with related content/topics, main content with 2 accordion blocks (investment team, scientists in residence), and related content cards at bottom

blocks.name: educational-grants
blocks.description: Independent Educational Grants page with hero, sidebar with topics, main content with CTA, image+goals section, grants list, accordion for therapeutic areas, and full-width apply CTA at bottom

sections.name: Publications Main Content (flex-section col-7)
defaultContent: ul (publication list items with links, journal em, DOI, authors)

sections.name: Related Content Sidebar (flex-section col-2)
defaultContent: ul (topic links: Areas of Focus, R&D Leaders, Careers)

templates.name: corporate-leader-profile
templates.description: Corporate leader profile page under Who We Are / Our Leaders section with hero (breadcrumb, name, title) and two-column bio (headshot + biography text)

templates.name: story-detail
templates.description: AbbVie 'Our Stories' article pages: intro section (breadcrumb/back-CTA + story info strip + title + subtitle), optional featured Brightcove video section, two-column narrative body (heading + paragraphs + custom image + carousel + pull quote + eyebrow + separator + bulleted list), references accordion + media-inquiries text, and related-content rail at the bottom.

sections.name: Featured Brightcove Video
sections.style: content regular, align center, section padding, container x large

sections.name: Story Body (Two-Column Narrative)
sections.style: grid container, content regular, padding bottom, grid cols 2

templates.name: homepage
templates.description: T01 — AbbVie Homepage: hero + press releases, patient story carousel, featured story card, science intro columns, key stats band (navy), Brightcove video, podcast promo, culture/partnerships columns, careers CTA (highlight), investor + stock ticker, ESG feature (dark), positions PDF linklist

templates.name: section-landing
templates.description: T02 — Section Landing Pages (who-we-are, science, patients, patient-support): hero, mission intro, optional video, featured story cards / tabs (science) / carousel (patients), key stats (navy), content columns, stock ticker + investor links, careers CTA (highlight)

templates.name: therapeutic-area
templates.description: T03 — Therapeutic Area Pages (6 pages under /science/areas-of-focus/): hero, optional video, intro text, related topics linklist, optional carousel (neuroscience), disease accordion, 3-col commitments, featured story cards, careers CTA (highlight)

templates.name: innovation-area
templates.description: T04 — Innovation Area Pages (6 pages under /science/areas-of-innovation/): hero, intro text, related topics linklist, 1-2 video embeds, 3-col columns, feature section (2-col asymmetric), application areas accordion, featured story cards, careers CTA (highlight)

templates.name: story-article
templates.description: T09 — Story Article Pages (116 pages under /who-we-are/our-stories/): full-width hero image (default content), metadata bar, article title H1 (default content), narrow body copy (default content), optional pull quotes, optional inline video embed, related articles story-cards

templates.name: stories-listing
templates.description: T10 — Stories Listing / Category Filter (17 pages under /who-we-are/our-stories/): featured hero story card (dark bg), optional secondary teaser, category filter + search tag-utility-nav, story card grid with show-more

templates.name: key-facts
templates.description: T12 — Stats & Facts Page (key-facts.html only): hero, intro text, report download cards (3-col), key metrics fact-card grid, recognition accordion

templates.name: rd-sites
templates.description: T13 — R&D Sites Page (rd-sites.html only): hero, intro text + key stats, global map visualization (pipeline placeholder), location spotlight card, location details accordion

templates.name: patient-assistance
templates.description: T14 — Patient Assistance Pages (7 pages): hero, program intro text, eligibility FAQ accordion, portal CTA linklist/columns, income criteria table (income-criteria.html only), related content cards, optional patient testimonial quote (highlight)

templates.name: brand-partnership
templates.description: T16 — Brand Partnership Pages (3 pages): hero, campaign intro + donation stat (default content), player testimonial quote, partnership cross-link teaser, partner features columns (2-col 50:42), related story cards

templates.name: rich-content
templates.description: T17 + T17b — Rich Content / Policy Pages (15 pages) and Disclosure/Data Table Pages (3 pages): optional hero (T17b has no hero), intro/mission text, optional linklist nav, optional columns, optional cards, optional quote (EEDI), optional 3-col columns, optional accordion, awards/recognitions default content

templates.name: sub-section-hub
templates.description: T05 — Sub-Section Hub Pages (5 pages under /science/): hero, intro text (container large), optional linklist nav, optional 2-col or 3-col columns, optional cards, optional accordion, optional video, careers CTA (highlight)

templates.name: publications
templates.description: T06 — Publications Page (science/publications.html): optional hero, intro text (container large), optional linklist nav, publications search/filter component, optional related 3-col cards

templates.name: science-hub
templates.description: T07 — Science Our-People Hub Pages (7 pages under /science/our-people/): hero, intro text (container large), optional linklist nav, optional video/podcast, optional tabs, optional story-card carousel, optional 3-col columns

templates.name: pipeline
templates.description: T08 — Pipeline Page (science/pipeline.html): hero, intro text (container large), optional phase filter linklist/tabs, pipeline data table (container x-large), optional disclosure accordion

templates.name: podcast-listing
templates.description: Podcast listing/hub page with hero, episode players, host bio, and CTA. Uses full-width sections, not 2-8-2 grid.
